江城大学流传着一个传说：新来的转校生苏红袖，是北方第一黑道家族的大小姐，性格暴戾，无人敢惹。
所有人都对她避之不及，直到某天暴雨夜。
普通学生陈默在巷子里捡回了一只浑身是血的“小野猫”，给她包扎伤口，煮了一碗热面。
他不知道，自己随手的善意，惹上了世界上最大的麻烦。
第二天，全校震惊。
那个眼神能杀人的苏红袖，竟然红着眼眶，拽着陈默的衣角不肯撒手：
“陈默，外面的人都想害我，只有你对我好……”
“你要是敢丢下我，我就把这所学校拆了，把你锁在家里，哪也不许去。”
陈默看着面前这只随时会黑化的“小野猫”，无奈叹气。
坏了，这下真甩不掉了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/53e2217d2671eb1f96afe9485d58894c","author":"今天我还没睡饱","author_id":"","book_id":"7594650924841192472","book_name":"开局捡到病娇，岳父求我别退货！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":826,"name":"黑道","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=826&name=黑道&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1460,"name":"都市江湖","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1460&name=都市江湖&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7594651050829693464","read_count":"90229","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"762009"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.9","serial_count":"326","tags":"都市日常,都市,单女主,大小姐,黑道,无后宫,都市江湖","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9d9de77cba7e78d89e23567453e7561b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779303236&x-signature=89WUKLWFU8zQDl9lApok9cdBw9w%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4199775295773876","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"49"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_ _count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":10174,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16657,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":9198},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7599014647909647128","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可以说是一部心善友好+高级厨艺家务的男主+略有黑道职业病的女主结合的纯爱日常剧，总体来说对比相类似的（也是黑道大小姐的类型），这篇就显得非常的日常+咸鱼，整体起伏就非常的平和（感觉），开篇的救人+占有欲确实很令人瞩目，只是后续似乎都是两人的温馨浪漫情侣环节，可以说还是值得看的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769295785,"group_id":"7594650924841192472","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"到处乱看而又不专业评测一本小说的小白","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+plnr8J2Gfaavy/OFvSS27jSFaw1hzaw0kBJilqK8Mr","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4ae4e2d8d11c49ccbc73633236f16631~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707300&x-signature=gSjz1nq5AYtKNsVXDFVgpxQ1Suc%3D","user_id":"1645323469464701","user_name":"白给ciallo"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1645323469464701","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1775079115,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","tit _count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":17763,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4935},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7602177698821915416","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"相当棒，不是看腻的那种女主怀疑男主爱不爱的病娇文，那种后期很爽，这个从头就爽，男主女主性格都很好，这种病娇是加分项，不像有的文里面病娇是有阻碍，而且不自然的，看看后续怎么样吧"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770024410,"group_id":"7594650924841192472","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxyGc6gPZYlvtcEHw5v6/Bq8TO8uWBfXPpOCmouEwQx9","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3229679598445479","user_name":"喜欢灰鼠蛇的王老板"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3229679598445479","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7594650924841192472","book_info":{"abstract":"【单女主+女追男+病娇黑帮大小姐+日常甜宠+无系统】
江城大学流传着一个传说：新来的转校生苏红袖，是北方第一黑道家族的大小姐，性格暴戾，无人敢惹。
所有人都对她避之不及，直到某天暴雨夜。
普通学生陈默在巷子里捡回了一只浑身是血的“小野猫”，给她包扎伤口，煮了一碗热面。
他不知道，自己随手的善意，惹上了世界上最大的麻烦。
第二天，全校震惊。
那个眼神能杀人的苏红袖，竟然红着眼眶，拽着陈默的衣角不肯撒手：
“陈默，外面的人都想害我，只有你对我好……”
“你要是敢丢下我，我就把这所学校拆了，把你锁在家里，哪也不许去。”
陈默看着面前这只随时会黑化的“小野猫”，无奈叹气。

江城大学流传着一个传说：新来的转校生苏红袖，是北方第一黑道家族的大小姐，性格暴戾，无人敢惹。
所有人都对她避之不及，直到某天暴雨夜。
普通学生陈默在巷子里捡回了一只浑身是血的“小野猫”，给她包扎伤口，煮了一碗热面。
他不知道，自己随手的善意，惹上了世界上最大的麻烦。
第二天，全校震惊。
那个眼神能杀人的苏红袖，竟然红着眼眶，拽着陈默的衣角不肯撒手：
“陈默，外面的人都想害我，只有你对我好……”

江城大学流传着一个传说：新来的转校生苏红袖，是北方第一黑道家族的大小姐，性格暴戾，无人敢惹。
所有人都对她避之不及，直到某天暴雨夜。
普通学生陈默在巷子里捡回了一只浑身是血的“小野猫”，给她包扎伤口，煮了一碗热面。
他不知道，自己随手的善意，惹上了世界上最大的麻烦。
第二天，全校震惊。
那个眼神能杀人的苏红袖，竟然红着眼眶，拽着陈默的衣角不肯撒手：
“陈默，外面的人都想害我，只有你对我好……”
“你要是敢丢下我，我就把这所学校拆了，把你锁在家里，哪也不许去。”
陈默看着面前这只随时会黑化的“小野猫”，无奈叹气。
